AMSC761 Applied Statistics Seminar (1 Credit)

Seminar taught once yearly on a rotating basis by faculty engaged in the Applied Statistics area. Required of AMSC Applied Statistics area doctoral students within one year following the completion of their practicum project, AMSC760, and open only to Applied Statistics Area students. The seminar will include sessions on presentation skills, but will consist primarily of oral presentations of students’ past Practicum project results. Students attend throughout the term, give one talk (at least 1/2 hour).

Recommended: STAT700 or STAT701; and (STAT740 or STAT741).
